title: Household Budget
description: A household budget app that automatically gathers and parses bank emails through a backend Python API running on a home server, inserting the information into MongoDB.

title: AstralCalc
description: A versatile calculator app that allows users to perform a range of calculations, including VAT, loans, interest, and unit conversions. Published on Google's Play Store.

title: Point-Of-Sale System
description: A comprehensive point-of-sale system that streamlined transactions and inventory management, increasing operational efficiency and customer satisfaction.

title: Automation Engines
description: Collection of automation standalone scripts and full fledged automation frameworks for various IT tasks, improving efficiency and reducing manual workload in enterprise environments.

title: Homelab Infrastructure
description: Personal homelab setup with servers, hypervisors, and containers for testing and development environments.

title: Enterprise Workflow Optimization Tool
description: Created a web application to streamline customer support requests and problems, improving customer satisfaction and reducing operational costs.

title: Customer Engagement Platform
description: Developed and managed a platform for CVM teams to execute targeted marketing campaigns via SMS and Push Notifications, incorporating a gamification system to enhance customer engagement and loyalty.

title: Unified Operations Dashboard
description: Designed and developed a comprehensive internal dashboard consolidating real-time data for regional tower operations, roaming partner status, CVM campaign tracking (ref: Project #8), and OpenShift/OpenStack cloud platform monitoring.

title: GymLog
description: Comprehensive workout tracking application that helps you monitor and analyze your gym activities. Supports various exercise types, muscle group targeting, detailed logging, and statistics.

title: MazadCars
description: MazadCars is your all-in-one webapp for managing car auctions and logistics.
